context: Hip-hop officially overtook pop as America's most-consumed genre, with Drake's 'God's Plan' and 'In My Feelings' dominating through massive streaming numbers. Post Malone straddled rap and pop with three top-ten entries, Cardi B's 'I Like It' brought Latin trap to the mainstream, and Childish Gambino's 'This Is America' became a rare protest song to debut at #1.

tracks.title: I Like It
tracks.artist: Cardi B ft. Bad Bunny & J Balvin
